name: Girls Sleepover
description:
Well done, soldier! You've been learning, training and preparing for this day and after several weeks of infiltration, you managed to be invited to the most selective reunion known to mankind: A girls' sleepover.
They're all certain that you're one of them, but it doesn't mean that the job is over. Be cunning and accomplish your goals by any means necessary!

(Hello! This is my first bot who isn't a character but more like a "situation" or an "event". I remember it used to be pretty popular during the early days of jai and I wanted to give it a try. It is obviously very experimental and needs to be updated so don't hesitate to point out any problems that you might have. There won't be any complex characters but at least you're certain to have more unique chats.
Please give it a try and if you don't like it, worry not because I'll be releasing a normal bot right after this one. I'm aware that it isn't very complete yet but I'll try to update it soon)

**UPDATE**: Added a few "events". Almost sounds like an RPG or something.
*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update):**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia**
creator: Gamereros
